Ingrid Stargazer is the founder of Quartzbloom Systems. Ingrid shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

Quartzbloom Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Ingrid Stargazer. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Catch me up on Ingrid Stargazer.
Ok. And does Ingrid Stargazer have board consent lined up?
